examples: Eleven point two kilometers per second, at which satellites can be freed from the gravitation of the earth, is called "escape speed".
One of them is the force of gravitation (地心引力), which tries to pull the satellite towards the earth and is like a rope which keeps the satellite from flying away.
This is called gravitation, or gravity.
